_comment: Single source of truth for the Fat Stacks Academy VIDEO brand (punchy money look). Read by lib/brand.ts (TS renderer) AND scripts/thumb-gen/generate.py (thumbnails) so graphics + thumbnails stay one identity. Paths are relative to the repo root.
name: Fat Stacks Academy

thumb._comment: Higher-saturation variants of the SAME hue family for thumbnails, which must win at 120px. Same identity, more punch — not a separate palette.

display.note: Anton — condensed heavy display, used UPPERCASE for titles/numbers

heavy.note: Archivo Black — heavy grotesque for stat chips / emphasis
